Market Intelligence Brief
Generated 14:02 ET
Massive SPY put blocks clash with single-name call strength ahead of NFP
KEY TAKEAWAYS
  • 1. Record SPY put block activity (652K contracts) signals institutional downside hedging despite single-name call outperformance in ARM and NVDA.
  • 2. Implied correlation collapse to 0.24 creates optimal dispersion opportunity with index puts cheap relative to single-name vol.
  • 3. Negative $10.8B SPY gamma amplifies today's NFP reaction with critical CPI looming in seven days.
NARRATIVE — NFP hedged, dispersion ready

Institutional flow reveals a stark hedging dichotomy ahead of today's NFP, with massive SPY put blocks totaling 652,873 contracts in the 650-653 strikes while single-name activity tilts bullish through ARM (+14.8% on CPU architecture wins) and NVDA strength. The SPY put wall at $650 coincides with negative $10.8B dealer gamma positioning that will amplify any NFP surprise beyond normal vol expectations. What stands out is the 0.5x divergence between index P/C (1.57 put-heavy) and single-name P/C (1.03 put-heavy), signaling classic institutional dispersion hedging. Implied correlation's collapse to 0.24 creates the cleanest dispersion setup in months, with single-name vol trading more efficiently than index vol despite broad bearish sentiment (-56). This disconnect explains why Millennium's aggressive Q4 AMZN reversal (+398% after Q3 reduction) and MSFT conviction build (+135% to $2.49B) haven't translated to index strength. The 36,414-contract IWM put spread (Apr 235P/238P) suggests small-cap weakness expectations that contradict the golden cross technical signals in IWM itself. Critical NFP and next week's CPI create a volatile backdrop where the current negative gamma regime ($-10.8B SPY, $-3.0B QQQ) transforms normal economic data into outsized moves. The VIX term structure backwardation (-0.12 spread) confirms short-term event risk dominance, making today's put-heavy positioning a hedge against accelerated downside rather than directional conviction.

Layer 1: Sentiment -56Layer 2: SPY GEX -$10.8BLayer 3: SPY puts 652KLayer 4: IC 0.24 dispersion
